subject: refactor(debug): harden DEBUG_SYSTEM — 10-part refactor per pattern
body:
Applies the glow-props DEBUG_SYSTEM pattern end-to-end:

src/utils/debugLog.ts (rewritten):
- A) DebugEntry gains numeric `id` (auto-incrementing) for stable React
     keys + dedup.
- B) DebugEntry gains optional `details: Record<string, unknown>` for
     structured post-mortem payloads. debugLog() takes an optional 4th arg.
- C) DebugSource is now a union with `(string & {})` fallback — known
     sources keep autocomplete, ad-hoc strings work without enum edits.
- F) `debugGenerateReport()` moved out of DebugPill into the module;
     reusable by any consumer.
- G) URL query strings redacted in reports — both the env URL line and
     any URL-ish substring inside entry events / stringified details.
- H) Global listeners (console.error/warn interception, window error +
     unhandledrejection) are now installed exactly once via the
     `window.__debugLogListenersAttached` flag, preventing HMR duplicates.
     The old `window.onerror = …` + `addEventListener('error', …)` double
     wiring is gone.
- I) `subscribe()` now replays existing entries to each new subscriber
     so late-mounting consumers see the full boot sequence.
- J) Every subscriber invocation is wrapped in try/catch — one throwing
     listener can't break the rest. `clearEntries()` now sends a 'clear'
     signal via the same notify path (cleaner than the previous
     `message === '__clear__'` sentinel).

The internal `message` field is renamed to `event` to match the pattern.
All external callers pass strings positionally, so no call-site changes
were needed outside DebugPill.

src/components/common/DebugPill.tsx (rewritten):
- D) Every Tailwind class replaced with inline `CSSProperties` style
     objects. The pill renders in an isolated React root (#debug-root),
     so a Tailwind build failure or delayed CSS load no longer affects
     its rendering.
- E) New "PWA" tab alongside Log/Env. Runs live diagnostics on open:
     HTTPS, network, SW support + registration state, manifest fetch +
     validation, standalone mode, beforeinstallprompt receipt. A
     monotonic run counter drops stale results if the tab is closed
     mid-probe.
- Entries are keyed by the new numeric `id` field.
- `Copy` now calls `debugGenerateReport()` from the module.
- `details` payload displayed inline on log entries.

src/types/browser.d.ts:
- Window gains optional `__debugLogListenersAttached` flag so the HMR
  guard is type-safe.

Tags: debug, refactor, diagnostics, fleet-alignment
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: cross-fleet-docs
Semver: patch
